apps.name: Dayframe
apps.promise: On-device Vision auto-picks your best daily video moment and assembles a monthly reel
apps.targetUser: People who've abandoned manual daily-video-diary habits
apps.one_sentence_promise: On-device Vision auto-picks your best daily video moment and assembles a monthly reel

apps.name: Interval
apps.promise: A focus timer that learns your real focus patterns and adapts session length/timing to you
apps.targetUser: People who've abandoned generic Pomodoro apps
apps.one_sentence_promise: A focus timer that learns your real focus patterns and adapts session length/timing to you

apps.name: Loose Ends
apps.promise: Weekly ritual resurfaces one dormant personal project at a time to act on, snooze, or release
apps.targetUser: People with a guilt-inducing backlog of unfinished personal intentions
apps.one_sentence_promise: Weekly ritual resurfaces one dormant personal project at a time to act on, snooze, or release

apps.name: Proofline
apps.promise: Cull, batch-grade, and produce a client-ready proof sheet from a full shoot in minutes
apps.targetUser: Parents/hobbyist & semi-pro photographers who dread post-shoot culling
apps.one_sentence_promise: Cull, batch-grade, and produce a client-ready proof sheet from a full shoot in minutes

apps.name: Shelf
apps.promise: Batch background-removal and consistent cropping for resale listing photos
apps.targetUser: Poshmark/Depop/eBay resellers shooting high item volume
apps.one_sentence_promise: Batch background-removal and consistent cropping for resale listing photos

apps.name: Tab Zero
apps.promise: Photograph a piece of mail and get it auto-filed as bill/todo/archive with the due date pulled out
apps.targetUser: People with a physical-mail pile-up and bill-deadline anxiety
apps.risk: Mechanic (document photo → extracted structured fields) sits close to the excluded PO-automation tool
apps.riskMitigation: Build phase must actively defend the single-envelope, no-vendor-workflow framing rather than treat the distinction as settled
apps.one_sentence_promise: Photograph a piece of mail and get it auto-filed as bill/todo/archive with the due date pulled out
